subcodes.first_line: I testify that Thou didst emerge from Thine abode, advancing toward the Ultimate Goal and the Most Exalted Summit, and didst traverse the land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشهد انک خرجت عن مقرک مقبلا الی الغایه القصوی و الذروه العلیا و قطعت البر و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
